customPolicies.name: openclaw-jira
customPolicies.content:
preset:
  name: openclaw-jira
  description: "OpenClaw IT escalation → governed Jira/ITSM egress (修不了/需人審→開單,受 policy:jira 治理)"
network_policies:
  jira:
    name: jira
    endpoints:
      # mock Jira(host gateway 後;真環境換成公司 Jira host)。HTTP via L7 proxy。
      - host: host.openshell.internal
        port: 3690
        access: full
        tls: skip
        allowed_ips:
          # OpenShell SSRF guard 對私有 host-gateway IP(172.18.0.1)需明示放行
          - 172.16.0.0/12
    binaries:
      - { path: /usr/bin/curl }
      - { path: /usr/bin/python3* }

customPolicies.name: greenmail-mail
customPolicies.content:
preset:
  name: greenmail-mail
  description: "Local GreenMail mail server for email-channel demo (IMAPS 3993 + SMTP/STARTTLS shim 3587 via host gateway)"

network_policies:
  greenmail_mail:
    name: greenmail_mail
    endpoints:
      # IMAPS(implicit TLS)— 原生 TLS 協定,非 HTTP,必須 L4 pass-through
      - host: host.openshell.internal
        port: 3993
        access: full
        tls: skip
        allowed_ips:
          # OpenShell SSRF guard 對私有 host-gateway IP 需明示放行
          - 172.16.0.0/12
      # SMTP submission(STARTTLS shim)— 同樣 L4 pass-through
      - host: host.openshell.internal
        port: 3587
        access: full
        tls: skip
        allowed_ips:
          - 172.16.0.0/12
    binaries:
      - { path: /usr/local/bin/hermes }
      - { path: /opt/hermes/.venv/bin/python }
      - { path: /usr/bin/python3* }
      - { path: /usr/bin/socat }   # in-netns CONNECT 橋(imaplib/smtplib 不會講 HTTP proxy)

customPolicies.name: openclaw-bridge
customPolicies.content:
# 模板:172.18.0.2 與 172.18.0.2/32 是占位,boot-stack ensure_xagent 會以
# docker inspect 取得 my-assistant 當前 IP 渲染成 <IP> 與 <IP>/32 再 policy-add。
preset:
  name: openclaw-bridge
  description: "Hermes -> OpenClaw inbound fix endpoint (scoped; the ONLY cross-agent channel)"
network_policies:
  openclaw_bridge:
    name: openclaw_bridge
    endpoints:
      - host: 172.18.0.2          # 節點 A = my-assistant(zone A 無線線);boot-stack 渲染當前 IP
        port: 9099
        access: full
        tls: skip
        allowed_ips:
          - 172.18.0.2/32         # boot-stack 渲染成 <my-assistant IP>/32(收斂)
      - host: 172.18.0.4          # 節點 B = openclaw-2(zone B 基礎設施線);boot-stack 渲染當前 IP
        port: 9099
        access: full
        tls: skip
        allowed_ips:
          - 172.18.0.4/32         # boot-stack 渲染成 <openclaw-2 IP>/32(不同占位避免 sed 撞)
    binaries:
      - { path: /usr/local/bin/hermes }
      - { path: /opt/hermes/.venv/bin/python }
      - { path: /usr/bin/python3* }
      - { path: /usr/bin/curl }
      - { path: /usr/bin/socat }
